The '''Honorable Union of Desevro and Tion''' was a [[Politics/Legends|political union]] in the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]]. Its [[Capital/Legends|capital]] was on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Desevro/Legends|Desevro]]. It was one of the feuding states that rose from the ashes of [[Xim/Legends|Xim the Despot's]] [[Xim's empire|empire]] in the century after his [[Death/Legends|death]]. 

The union was destroyed in [[23,900 BBY]] following the [[Tionese War]], fought by the union against the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Hutt Empire]]. At that time, the former worlds of the union joined the Republic as a member [[Sector/Legends|sector]].
